purpose: Local-only bounded RealVisXL smoke profile for fast ComfyUI runtime iteration on the RTX 5060 Laptop GPU. This does not replace EC2 target-runtime proof.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic natural-light portrait of an adult subject, realistic skin texture, lifelike eyes, detailed hair strands, believable facial asymmetry, soft fabric texture, clean photographic lens rendering, balanced studio shadows, subtle background depth
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, CGI, doll-like face, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed texture, dead eyes, crossed eyes, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, watermark, text, logo, blurry, low resolution
